messages.content: 翻译：没把剂量种类挑到我们要求的那种程度
The dosage type was not selected to the level we required.
有无语法错误：Hence it can only be categorized into ineffective controlled hypertension, with the blood pressure not meeting the standard.

The sentence mostly makes sense but could be slightly improved for clarity. Here is a revised version:

"Hence, it can only be categorized as poorly controlled hypertension, with the blood pressure not meeting the standard."

This revision enhances readability and follows grammar conventions more closely.

反正都统称为血压不达标是吧？对。血压不达标这一类范畴。
130 140这两个反正我都统归血压控制不佳范畴。

So, in any case, they are all referred to as not meeting the blood pressure standard, right? Yes. The category of not meeting the blood pressure standard. Whether it's 130 or 140, in any case, I classify them all under the category of poor blood pressure control.
您认不认为这里展示的两种患者的群体其实是一类的患者，还是说其实他们有区别的？
是否认为展示的两种患者群体实际上属于同一类患者，还是他们之间存在区别，这取决于多种因素，比如他们的具体状况、疾病程度、治疗响应以及其他相关健康问题。如果这两组患者有共同的临床特征、诊断、治疗方法和预后，则可以认为他们属于同一类。然而，如果他们在这些方面存在显著差异，那么他们应该被视为不同的群体。因此，要对此作出准确判断，需要具体分析他们的临床信息和健康状况。
翻译：就是难治性和未控制的血压，这两类都混到一块，吗？
So, does it mean that the categories of refractory and uncontrolled blood pressure are both mixed together?
